title: The Cyclone's Wake
strategies: do nothing: no shipments at all -- reproduces the evaluator's do-nothing baseline

reactive safety-stock rebalancing off the CURRENT bin's coarse per-cluster reading, guessing a modest one-size-fits-all top-up whenever a depot's cluster looks active right now -- never anticipates, so every shipment lands L steps late and misses the strike itself

keep that reactive backstop, but ALSO use the current bin's per-cluster reading to identify the currently-active storm cluster with confidence, exploit the known cyclic transition structure to predict the NEXT cluster, and pre-stage a full-sized hub batch toward it immediately -- catching the strike a purely reactive policy always misses; the candidate is invoked once per bin (causally, seeing only elapsed bins) so this genuinely requires forecasting, not lookup
the same regime-aware pre-positioning, generalizing across fast-cycling and slow-dwell instances alike
